description: Raxel Telematics operates the Damoov mobile telematics platform for insurers, fleets, and mobility companies. It provides smartphone-based trip tracking, driving analytics, scoring, live monitoring, and related telematics services.
summary: raxeltelematics.com points to Damoov, whose public developer integration surface is HTTP APIs on telematicssdk.com: a main REST API plus a separate user-registration API; no GraphQL, MCP server, or first-party CLI was found for raxeltelematics.com-owned endpoints.
